How to use this catalog
Each framework section contains a full pipeline stage table. Every row is a ticket-ready unit: copy the Stage, Type, Tool, and Command fields to create a Jira or Notion task.
Phase 0 — run once per repository (see global section below). Phases 1–3 — expand the framework section to see language-specific tools. Compliance — apply deltas from the compliance table on top of the base pipeline. Registry — pick one registry from the global registry table; substitute $REGISTRY in all commands.
Stage type legend — DevSecOps vs DevOps

DevSecOps (blue badge) — security control stage. Blocks the pipeline if it fails. Cannot be skipped.

DevOps (green badge) — infrastructure / workflow stage. Required for delivery but not a security gate.

Stages marked ↗ parallel in Phase 2 and Phase 3 run simultaneously — all 5 must pass before the next stage starts.

Pipeline flow — phase order and triggers

Phase 0: once, on repo setup. Not per-PR. Sets branch protection, OIDC, registry, Kyverno.

Phase 1: developer machine. Triggered on git commit. Pre-commit hooks block insecure commits locally.

Phase 2: CI. Triggered on every PR push. PR not mergeable until all 10 stages pass + human approval.

Phase 3: CI. Triggered on merge to main. Produces signed, attested, FIPS-tagged image in registry.

Registry: after Phase 3. Stores signed image. All 3 attestations (sign, SBOM, SLSA) must be present before any promotion.

Promotions: DEV → TEST → STAGING → PROD. Each gated by explicit approval. PROD uses Argo Rollouts canary.

Full diagram: doc 02 Pipeline Schema

Compliance and registry — how to apply

Compliance: the global compliance table below shows what each standard adds per phase. These are additive — start with the base pipeline, then add the standard's requirements. Multiple standards stack.

Registry: all frameworks use the same 6 registries. Pick one. Substitute $REGISTRY in all push, pull, and sign commands. OIDC (keyless) auth is shown — preferred over stored credentials.

FIPS images: Phase 3 builds both --target runtime and --target runtime-fips. Both are pushed and signed. FedRAMP, CMMC, and some HIPAA implementations require the FIPS variant.

Mandatory ENV vars — all 14 language families

These ENV instructions belong in every Dockerfile for the listed family. Missing any one of them causes the failure described in the Why column. Set them in the builder stage unless marked runtime.

Family Stage ENV instruction Why — what breaks without it
All (ubuntu:24.04 builder) builder ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get prompts for timezone input — build hangs forever with no output
Node.js (SSR, Streaming, Islands, Backend, PWA) builder ENV NODE_ENV=production npm install includes devDependencies — runtime image 2–5× larger, secrets in dev deps exposed
Node.js → nginx (CSR/SPA, SSG, Micro-frontends) builder only ENV NODE_ENV=production Same as above — dev deps bloat the build stage; nginx runtime stage is unaffected
Deno builder + runtime ENV DENO_DIR=/deno-dir Deno writes module cache to $HOME — different per user; cache misses on every build
Bun builder ENV NODE_ENV=production Bun reads NODE_ENV — without it, Bun installs dev packages into the image
Hugo (SSG) builder ENV HUGO_ENV=production Hugo skips minification and draft-exclusion — larger output, draft posts included in build
Python (FastAPI, Django, Flask, Starlette) builder + runtime ENV PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 PIP_NO_CACHE_DIR=1 PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 — without it, Python writes .pyc byte-cache files; image 50–200 MB larger
PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 — without it, stdout is buffered; crash logs are lost before container exits
PIP_NO_CACHE_DIR=1 — without it, pip stores its own download cache inside the image layer
Go (Gin, Echo, Fiber, Chi) builder ENV CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 CGO_ENABLED=0 — without it, Go links against libc; binary does not run in scratch (no libc)
GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 — without it, Go compiles for the builder host arch (arm64 on M-chip Mac); binary fails to start in prod
Java JVM (Spring Boot, Quarkus, Micronaut) runtime ENV JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS="-XX:+UseContainerSupport -XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75.0" UseContainerSupport — without it, JVM reads host RAM (e.g. 64 GB) not container limit (e.g. 512 MB); heap is miscalculated
MaxRAMPercentage=75.0 — without it, JVM allocates 25% of visible RAM as heap; container OOMKills before app starts
Kotlin JVM (Ktor, Spring Boot Kotlin) runtime ENV JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS="-XX:+UseContainerSupport -XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75.0" Same as Java — Kotlin compiles to JVM bytecode; identical JVM memory behaviour
Scala JVM (Play, http4s) runtime ENV JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS="-XX:+UseContainerSupport -XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75.0" Same as Java — Scala runs on the JVM; same heap miscalculation risk without these flags
Clojure JVM (Ring, Pedestal) runtime ENV JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS="-XX:+UseContainerSupport -XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75.0" Same as Java — Clojure compiles to JVM; same OOMKill risk in containers
.NET (ASP.NET Core, Minimal APIs) runtime ENV DOTNET_RUNNING_IN_CONTAINER=true ASPNETCORE_URLS=http://+:8080 DOTNET_RUNNING_IN_CONTAINER=true — without it, .NET disables container-aware GC tuning; memory usage is unpredictable
ASPNETCORE_URLS=http://+:8080 — without it, ASP.NET listens on localhost only; Kubernetes health probes from a different IP fail
Rust (Axum, Actix-web) builder ENV CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 RUSTFLAGS="-C target-cpu=x86-64" CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 — without it, Cargo writes incremental build artifacts; CI cache bloats by 500 MB+ per build
RUSTFLAGS target-cpu — without it, binary uses native CPU instructions (arm64 in CI); binary fails on prod x86_64 with SIGILL
Elixir / BEAM (Phoenix) builder ENV MIX_ENV=prod PHX_SERVER=true MIX_ENV=prod — without it, mix compiles with dev config; runtime image includes dev dependencies and debug tooling
PHX_SERVER=true — without it, Phoenix release does not start the HTTP endpoint; container starts but accepts no traffic
Ruby (Rails, Sinatra) builder + runtime ENV RAILS_ENV=production BUNDLE_PATH=/vendor/bundle BUNDLE_WITHOUT="development test" RAILS_ENV=production — without it, Rails loads development middleware (better_errors, web-console) in prod; security risk
BUNDLE_PATH=/vendor/bundle — without it, gems install to /usr/local/lib; the path differs between builder and runtime stages; app fails to find gems
BUNDLE_WITHOUT — without it, bundler installs test and dev gems; runtime image 100–400 MB larger
PHP (Laravel, Symfony, Slim) builder ENV COMPOSER_ALLOW_SUPERUSER=1 APP_ENV=production COMPOSER_ALLOW_SUPERUSER=1 — without it, Composer refuses to run as root in the builder stage; build fails with a warning-turned-error
APP_ENV=production — without it, Laravel/Symfony caches dev routes and configs; performance and security settings differ from prod
Swift Server (Vapor, Hummingbird) builder ENV SWIFT_VERSION=6.0 Without it, the swift.org tarball URL in the builder stage has no version variable to resolve; build fails on ARG/ENV substitution
C / C++ (Drogon, Crow) builder ENV CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release Without it, CMake defaults to Debug; binary includes debug symbols — 3–10× larger; assert() checks active in prod crash the process on any assertion failure

CI-only frameworks (13): React Native, Expo, Ionic, Flutter, .NET MAUI, Kotlin Multiplatform, Swift/SwiftUI, Objective-C, Kotlin Jetpack Compose, Java Android SDK, Next.js Edge, Hono Edge, Remix Cloudflare — no Dockerfile, no ENV instructions needed. Output is APK / IPA / edge bundle.

Tool alternatives — all stages, all language families

Pick one tool per stage. All options listed. Commands are copy-pasteable. CodeQL requires GitHub Actions — shown as workflow step.

Dockerfile lint (Phase 1 — all dockerized frameworks)

ToolCommandWhat it catches
hadolinthadolint DockerfileDockerfile best practices, shell script issues in RUN
checkovcheckov -d . --framework dockerfileSecurity misconfigs: root user, ADD vs COPY, exposed secrets

Secret scan (Phase 1 — all frameworks)

ToolCommandWhat it catches
gitleaksgitleaks detect --stagedSecrets in staged files before commit
trufflehogtrufflehog git file://. --only-verifiedVerified secrets in git history

SCA — Dependency audit (Phase 1 + Phase 2)

ToolLanguage familyCommand
npm auditNode.js (npm)npm audit --audit-level=high
yarn auditNode.js (yarn)yarn audit --level high
pnpm auditNode.js (pnpm)pnpm audit --audit-level high
deno auditDenodeno audit
bun auditBunbun audit
pip-auditPythonpip-audit --vulnerability-service pypi
safetyPythonsafety check --json > safety.json
govulncheckGogovulncheck ./...
nancyGogo list -json -m all | nancy sleuth
mvn OWASPJava (Maven)mvn org.owasp:dependency-check-maven:check
gradle OWASPJava/Kotlin (Gradle)./gradlew dependencyCheckAnalyze
dotnet vuln.NETdotnet list package --vulnerable --include-transitive
cargo auditRustcargo audit --json > cargo-audit.json
cargo denyRustcargo deny check advisories
mix auditElixirmix audit
bundle auditRubybundle audit check --update
composer auditPHPcomposer audit --format=json
swift package auditSwiftswift package audit
sbt dependencyCheckScalasbt dependencyCheck
lein nvdClojurelein nvd check
vcpkgC/C++vcpkg x-check-support-status
osv-scannerAll (lockfile-based)osv-scanner --recursive .
snykAllsnyk test --severity-threshold=high

SAST — Static analysis (Phase 2)

ToolLanguage familyCommand / Step
semgrepAllsemgrep --config=auto .
CodeQLJS/TS, Python, Go, Java, Kotlin, Ruby, Swift, C/C++, C#uses: github/codeql-action/analyze@v3 (GitHub Actions)
njsscanNode.jsnjsscan --json . > njsscan.json
eslint-securityNode.jseslint . --plugin security
banditPythonbandit -r . -ll -o bandit.json -f json
pylint-securityPythonpylint --load-plugins pylint_security src/
gosecGogosec -fmt json -out gosec.json ./...
staticcheckGostaticcheck ./...
spotbugs+pmdJavamvn spotbugs:check pmd:check
checkstyleJavamvn checkstyle:check
detektKotlin./gradlew detekt
ktlintKotlin./gradlew ktlintCheck
dotnet warnings.NETdotnet build /p:TreatWarningsAsErrors=true
security-code-scan.NETdotnet build /p:Analyzers=SecurityCodeScan.VS2019
cargo clippyRustcargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
cargo geigerRustcargo geiger --all-features
mix sobelowElixirmix sobelow --config
mix credoElixirmix credo --strict
brakemanRubybrakeman --exit-on-warn -o brakeman.json
rubocopRubyrubocop --require rubocop-rails
phpstanPHPphpstan analyse --level=6
psalmPHPpsalm --output-format=json
swiftlintSwiftswiftlint lint --strict
scalafixScalasbt scalafix
clj-kondoClojureclj-kondo --lint src
clang-tidyC/C++clang-tidy src/**/*.cpp -- -I include
cppcheckC/C++cppcheck --enable=all --xml src/

Image scan (Phase 2 + Phase 3 — all dockerized)

ToolCommandWhat it scans
trivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $IMAGEOS packages, language libs, misconfigs, secrets
grypegrype $IMAGE --fail-on highOS packages, language libs (Anchore DB)
docker scoutdocker scout cves $IMAGECVEs via Docker Hub integration
snyk containersnyk container test $IMAGE --severity-threshold=highOS + app layer CVEs, Snyk DB

SBOM generation (Phase 3 — all dockerized)

ToolCommandOutput format
syftsyft $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA -o spdx-json > sbom.spdx.jsonSPDX JSON
cyclonedx-npmcyclonedx-npm --output sbom.cdx.jsonCycloneDX JSON (Node.js)
cyclonedx-pycyclonedx-py -o sbom.cdx.jsonCycloneDX JSON (Python)
cyclonedx-gomodcyclonedx-gomod app -output sbom.cdx.jsonCycloneDX JSON (Go)
mvn cyclonedxmvn org.cyclonedx:cyclonedx-maven-plugin:makeAggregateBomCycloneDX JSON (Java)
cargo cyclonedxcargo cyclonedx -f json > sbom.cdx.jsonCycloneDX JSON (Rust)
dotnet CycloneDXdotnet CycloneDX . -o sbom.cdx.jsonCycloneDX JSON (.NET)

Image sign + attestation (Phase 3)

ToolCommand / StepWhat it provides
cosign keylesscosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGESTKeyless OIDC signature via Sigstore Fulcio
SLSA Level 3uses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/...slsa3.yml@v2Build provenance attestation — who built what from where

CodeQL note: Supported languages: JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, Go, Java, Kotlin, Ruby, Swift, C/C++, C#. Not supported: PHP, Elixir, Clojure, Scala, Rust, Deno, Bun — use semgrep for those.

Phase 0 — Bootstrap (same for all 75 frameworks)

Runs once when the repository is created. Not triggered by PRs or pushes. Sets the constraints every other phase depends on.
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch

Phase 0 is identical for all frameworks. Complete it once per repository. The Kyverno policy and OIDC trust must be set before any Phase 2 or Phase 3 run.

Compliance Standard Pipeline Deltas

What each compliance standard adds or changes per pipeline phase. Apply these on top of the base pipeline shown in each framework section. See doc 12 for Dockerfile-level changes.
Standard Applies to Phase 0 Phase 2 Phase 3 Registry Promotions
FIPS 140-2/3US federal / DoD / FedRAMPConfirm registry supports signed FIPS imagesBuild with --target runtime-fips in FIPS-capable builderPush both runtime and runtime-fips tags; sign both with cosignStore both :latest and :fips tags; sign-verify bothDeploy runtime-fips image to all environments; enforce in Kyverno policy
PCI DSS 4.0Payment card processorsRestrict registry write to release branch only; enable audit loggingFail on any CRITICAL CVE (Trivy --exit-code 1 --severity CRITICAL); fail on hardcoded secretsRequire zero CRITICAL CVEs before sign; add payment-specific SAST rulesEnable immutable tags; log all pull events; restrict pull to production namespacesNetwork segmentation policy in Kyverno; no internet egress from payment containers
HIPAAUS healthcare (covered entities + BAs)Enable audit logging on registry; document BAA with cloud providerFail on HIGH+CRITICAL CVEs; scan for PHI patterns in source codeEnforce TLS 1.2+ in app config; non-root USER; read-only filesystem where possibleEnable access logging; restrict pull to HIPAA-scoped namespacesEnforce Pod Security Standards (restricted); seccompProfile RuntimeDefault
FedRAMP Moderate/HighUS federal agencies and SaaS providersOIDC trust to FedRAMP-authorized cloud region; FIPS registry access onlyFIPS build target required; SBOM in SPDX 2.3 format; SLSA Level 3 attestationContainer must use FIPS-certified runtime; cosign sign with hardware key or FulcioDeploy to GovCloud (AWS us-gov-* / Azure USGov); immutable tags enforcedContinuous monitoring via AWS Config / Azure Policy; runtime image scanned daily
CMMC 2.0 (Level 2)US DoD contractorsMFA on all CI/CD accounts; OIDC for keyless auth; CODEOWNERS for all pathsAccess control: only named reviewers can approve PRs containing CUIFull audit trail: every pipeline run logged, signed, and retained 3 yearsRestrict to US-only regions; no cross-region replication to foreign jurisdictionsIncident response plan documented; deployment events logged to SIEM
SOC 2 Type IISaaS companies with enterprise customersEnable branch protection evidence collection; log all admin actionsEvidence: save scan results as artifacts for audit evidence packagesRetain all pipeline artifacts (logs, SBOMs, scan results) for audit periodEnable pull logging; image retention policy documentedChange management: every deployment linked to approved ticket; rollback tested
SOX (IT General Controls)Publicly traded US companiesSegregation of duties: developer cannot approve own PR or deploy to productionRequired reviewer must be from a separate team (enforce via CODEOWNERS)Change management ticket required before merge to main; approval documentedImmutable image tags; no manual overwrites in production registryPROD deployment requires second-person authorization; audit log exported to GRC tool
GDPREU data processors and controllersConfirm all CI/CD infra in EU regions (GitHub Actions self-hosted or EU data center)Scan source for hardcoded PII; fail on any PII found in code or configLog processing activities in image labels; ensure encryption at rest enforcedRegistry must be in EU region; cross-border transfer documentedData residency enforced in Kubernetes namespace policy; egress to non-EU blocked
PIPEDA / Quebec Law 25Canadian businessesConfirm all CI/CD infra in Canadian regions (AWS ca-central-1 / Azure Canada Central)Scan source for Canadian PII patterns; fail on any foundEnsure image metadata documents data processing purposeRegistry must be in Canadian region; no personal data in image layersNamespace policy enforces ca-central-1 / Canada Central regions only
NERC CIPNorth American electric utilitiesAir-gap CI from internet where possible; strict access control with role-based authFail on any CRITICAL CVE; no internet access during build (vendored deps)Offline build environment; all deps vendored; no external network calls in buildAir-gapped private registry; no public registry pullChange control ticket with CIP change management evidence; rollback plan documented
ISO 27001Global enterprise / certification-seeking companiesISMS asset register: document all pipeline components and their risk ratingsRisk-based scan thresholds: document risk acceptance for deferred vulnerabilitiesFull artifact retention per retention schedule (usually 3–5 years)Access review quarterly; registry credentials rotated annuallyIncident response runbook linked from deployment pipeline; change approval documented

Compliance changes are additive — apply the base pipeline first, then layer the standard's requirements on top. Multiple standards stack: FedRAMP implies FIPS; CMMC implies SOC 2 controls.

Registry Configuration (all 6 registries)

Push format, OIDC auth, and sign command for each registry. Use OIDC (keyless) auth everywhere — no stored credentials. See doc 11 for FIPS image variants.
Registry Image URL pattern Auth method (OIDC preferred) Push command
Docker Hubdocker.io/{org}/{repo}:{tag}docker/login-action with DOCKER_USERNAME + DOCKER_PASSWORD secretsdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push -t docker.io/myorg/myapp:$SHA .
AWS ECR{account}.dkr.ecr.{region}.amazonaws.com/{repo}:{tag}aws-actions/amazon-ecr-login with OIDC (no stored credentials)docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push -t $ECR_REGISTRY/$ECR_REPO:$SHA .
GCP Artifact Registry{region}-docker.pkg.dev/{project}/{repo}/{image}:{tag}google-github-actions/auth + google-github-actions/setup-gclouddocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push -t $REGION-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT/$REPO/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Azure Container Registry{registry}.azurecr.io/{repo}:{tag}azure/login with OIDC (Azure AD Federated Credentials)docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push -t $ACR_REGISTRY/$IMAGE_NAME:$SHA .
GitHub GHCRghcr.io/{owner}/{repo}:{tag}docker/login-action with GITHUB_TOKEN (no stored secret needed)docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push -t ghcr.io/$GITHUB_REPOSITORY:$SHA .
Red Hat Quayquay.io/{org}/{repo}:{tag}docker/login-action with Quay robot account token or OIDCdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push -t quay.io/$ORG/$REPO:$SHA .

FIPS images: push both :$SHA (standard) and :$SHA-fips (FIPS runtime) tags in Phase 3. Sign both with cosign.
Cosign OIDC: requires permissions: id-token: write in the workflow job. No key pair needed — Sigstore Fulcio issues a short-lived cert per build.

01 — SSR / Hybrid

Framework Language family Pattern Port Pkg mgr Runtime image
Next.js 16Node.jsMulti-stage3000npm|yarn|pnpmnode:22-alpine
Remix 7Node.jsMulti-stage3000npm|yarn|pnpmnode:22-alpine
Nuxt 4.4Node.jsMulti-stage3000npm|yarn|pnpmnode:22-alpine
SvelteKit 2.57Node.jsMulti-stage3000npm|yarn|pnpmnode:22-alpine
Angular SSR 20Node.jsMulti-stage4000npm|yarn|pnpmnode:22-alpine
Next.js 16 Node.js Multi-stage

SCA note: Replace npm with yarn audit or pnpm audit per ARG PM

Build note: ARG PM=pnpm → pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm run build

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev (git commit trigger)
IDE setupDevOpsESLint + Prettier + Error Lens (VS Code / WebStorm)Install from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpshadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate (every PR push)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build (no push)DevOpsdocker buildxdocker build --platform linux/amd64 --target runtime -t app:pr-${{ github.sha }} --load .
SBOM generateDevSecOpssyftsyft packages docker:app:pr-$SHA -o spdx-json > sbom.json
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL app:pr-$SHA
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpsJest / Vitestnpm test -- --coverage --coverageReporters=lcov && codecov
DASTDevSecOpsOWASP ZAPzap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:3000
Perf testDevOpsk6k6 run perf/smoke.js
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — after Phase 3 completes
Image storeDevOpsDocker registry (see Registry section)Push completed in Phase 3 Build + Push above
Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM attachDevSecOpsoras attachoras attach --artifact-type application/vnd.cyclonedx $IMAGE@$DIGEST sbom.json
SLSA attachDevSecOpsoras attachAttached automatically by slsa-github-generator output
Promotions — DEV → TEST → STAGING → PROD (same pattern for all frameworks)
DEV: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in dev/kustomization.yaml
DEV: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from dev overlay; wait for rollout
DEV: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
DEV: Integration testsDevOpspytest / Jest / go test / curlRun integration test suite against deployed service
DEV: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers listed in environment settings
TEST: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in test/kustomization.yaml
TEST: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from test overlay
TEST: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
TEST: Integration + contract testsDevOpsPact / Dredd + test suiteRun contract and integration tests
TEST: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before staging promotion
STAGING: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in staging/kustomization.yaml
STAGING: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from staging overlay
STAGING: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
STAGING: Regression testsDevOpsfull test suiteRun full regression test suite
STAGING: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before production promotion
PROD: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in prod/kustomization.yaml
PROD: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from prod overlay
PROD: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
PROD: Argo Rollouts canaryDevOpsArgo RolloutsCanary: 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% over 30 min
PROD: Monitor → complete/rollbackDevOpsPrometheus + Argo RolloutsAuto-rollback if error rate >1% or p99 >2s
Remix 7 Node.js Multi-stage

SCA note: Replace npm with yarn audit or pnpm audit per ARG PM

Build note: ARG PM=pnpm → pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm run build

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev (git commit trigger)
IDE setupDevOpsESLint + Prettier + Error Lens (VS Code / WebStorm)Install from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpshadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate (every PR push)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build (no push)DevOpsdocker buildxdocker build --platform linux/amd64 --target runtime -t app:pr-${{ github.sha }} --load .
SBOM generateDevSecOpssyftsyft packages docker:app:pr-$SHA -o spdx-json > sbom.json
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL app:pr-$SHA
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpsJest / Vitestnpm test -- --coverage --coverageReporters=lcov && codecov
DASTDevSecOpsOWASP ZAPzap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:3000
Perf testDevOpsk6k6 run perf/smoke.js
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — after Phase 3 completes
Image storeDevOpsDocker registry (see Registry section)Push completed in Phase 3 Build + Push above
Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM attachDevSecOpsoras attachoras attach --artifact-type application/vnd.cyclonedx $IMAGE@$DIGEST sbom.json
SLSA attachDevSecOpsoras attachAttached automatically by slsa-github-generator output
Promotions — DEV → TEST → STAGING → PROD (same pattern for all frameworks)
DEV: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in dev/kustomization.yaml
DEV: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from dev overlay; wait for rollout
DEV: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
DEV: Integration testsDevOpspytest / Jest / go test / curlRun integration test suite against deployed service
DEV: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers listed in environment settings
TEST: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in test/kustomization.yaml
TEST: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from test overlay
TEST: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
TEST: Integration + contract testsDevOpsPact / Dredd + test suiteRun contract and integration tests
TEST: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before staging promotion
STAGING: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in staging/kustomization.yaml
STAGING: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from staging overlay
STAGING: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
STAGING: Regression testsDevOpsfull test suiteRun full regression test suite
STAGING: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before production promotion
PROD: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in prod/kustomization.yaml
PROD: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from prod overlay
PROD: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
PROD: Argo Rollouts canaryDevOpsArgo RolloutsCanary: 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% over 30 min
PROD: Monitor → complete/rollbackDevOpsPrometheus + Argo RolloutsAuto-rollback if error rate >1% or p99 >2s
Nuxt 4.4 Node.js Multi-stage

02 — CSR / SPA

Client-side rendering. Output: static dist/ served by nginx. No Node.js at runtime.  ·  See framework catalog →
Framework Language family Pattern Port Pkg mgr Runtime image
React 19Node.js → nginxMulti-stage80npm|yarn|pnpmnginx:alpine
Vue 3.5Node.js → nginxMulti-stage80npm|yarn|pnpmnginx:alpine
Angular 20Node.js → nginxMulti-stage80npm|yarn|pnpmnginx:alpine
Svelte 5Node.js → nginxMulti-stage80npm|yarn|pnpmnginx:alpine
Solid.js 2.0Node.js → nginxMulti-stage80npm|yarn|pnpmnginx:alpine
React 19 Node.js → nginx Multi-stage

SCA note: Replace npm with yarn audit or pnpm audit per ARG PM

Build note: Output served by nginx — no Node.js at runtime

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action

Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL app:pr-$SHA
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpsJest / Vitest / Playwrightnpm test -- --coverage && codecov
DASTDevSecOpsOWASP ZAPzap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:8080
Perf testDevOpsk6k6 run perf/smoke.js
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — after Phase 3 completes
Image storeDevOpsDocker registry (see Registry section)Push completed in Phase 3 Build + Push above
Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM attachDevSecOpsoras attachoras attach --artifact-type application/vnd.cyclonedx $IMAGE@$DIGEST sbom.json
SLSA attachDevSecOpsoras attachAttached automatically by slsa-github-generator output
Promotions — DEV → TEST → STAGING → PROD (same pattern for all frameworks)
DEV: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in dev/kustomization.yaml
DEV: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from dev overlay; wait for rollout
DEV: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
DEV: Integration testsDevOpspytest / Jest / go test / curlRun integration test suite against deployed service
DEV: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers listed in environment settings
TEST: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in test/kustomization.yaml
TEST: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from test overlay
TEST: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
TEST: Integration + contract testsDevOpsPact / Dredd + test suiteRun contract and integration tests
TEST: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before staging promotion
STAGING: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in staging/kustomization.yaml
STAGING: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from staging overlay
STAGING: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
STAGING: Regression testsDevOpsfull test suiteRun full regression test suite
STAGING: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before production promotion
PROD: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in prod/kustomization.yaml
PROD: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from prod overlay
PROD: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
PROD: Argo Rollouts canaryDevOpsArgo RolloutsCanary: 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% over 30 min
PROD: Monitor → complete/rollbackDevOpsPrometheus + Argo RolloutsAuto-rollback if error rate >1% or p99 >2s
Vue 3.5 Node.js → nginx Multi-stage

SCA note: Replace npm with yarn audit or pnpm audit per ARG PM

Build note: Output served by nginx — no Node.js at runtime

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev (git commit trigger)
IDE setupDevOpsESLint + Prettier + Error Lens (VS Code / WebStorm)Install from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpshadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate (every PR push)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build (no push)DevOpsdocker buildxdocker build --platform linux/amd64 --target runtime -t app:pr-${{ github.sha }} --load .
SBOM generateDevSecOpssyftsyft packages docker:app:pr-$SHA -o spdx-json > sbom.json
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL app:pr-$SHA
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpsJest / Vitest / Playwrightnpm test -- --coverage && codecov
DASTDevSecOpsOWASP ZAPzap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:8080
Perf testDevOpsk6k6 run perf/smoke.js
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — after Phase 3 completes
Image storeDevOpsDocker registry (see Registry section)Push completed in Phase 3 Build + Push above
Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM attachDevSecOpsoras attachoras attach --artifact-type application/vnd.cyclonedx $IMAGE@$DIGEST sbom.json
SLSA attachDevSecOpsoras attachAttached automatically by slsa-github-generator output

DEV: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
DEV: Integration testsDevOpspytest / Jest / go test / curlRun integration test suite against deployed service
DEV: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers listed in environment settings
TEST: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in test/kustomization.yaml
TEST: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from test overlay
TEST: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
TEST: Integration + contract testsDevOpsPact / Dredd + test suiteRun contract and integration tests
TEST: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before staging promotion
STAGING: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in staging/kustomization.yaml
STAGING: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from staging overlay
STAGING: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
STAGING: Regression testsDevOpsfull test suiteRun full regression test suite
STAGING: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before production promotion
PROD: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in prod/kustomization.yaml
PROD: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from prod overlay
PROD: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
PROD: Argo Rollouts canaryDevOpsArgo RolloutsCanary: 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% over 30 min
PROD: Monitor → complete/rollbackDevOpsPrometheus + Argo RolloutsAuto-rollback if error rate >1% or p99 >2s

03 — SSG

Static site generation. Output: pre-rendered HTML + assets served by nginx.  ·  See framework catalog →
Framework Language family Pattern Port Pkg mgr Runtime image
Astro 6.3Node.js → nginxMulti-stage80npm|yarn|pnpmnginx:alpine
Eleventy 3.0Node.js → nginxMulti-stage80npm|yarn|pnpmnginx:alpine
Hugo 0.161Hugo (Go binary)Multi-stage80nonenginx:alpine
Gatsby 5.13Node.js → nginxMulti-stage80npm|yarn|pnpmnginx:alpine
Astro 6.3 Node.js → nginx Multi-stage

SCA note: Replace npm with yarn audit or pnpm audit per ARG PM

Build note: Output served by nginx — no Node.js at runtime

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev (git commit trigger)
IDE setupDevOpsESLint + Prettier + Error Lens (VS Code / WebStorm)Install from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpshadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate (every PR push)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build (no push)DevOpsdocker buildxdocker build --platform linux/amd64 --target runtime -t app:pr-${{ github.sha }} --load .
SBOM generateDevSecOpssyftsyft packages docker:app:pr-$SHA -o spdx-json > sbom.json
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL app:pr-$SHA
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpsJest / Vitest / Playwrightnpm test -- --coverage && codecov
DASTDevSecOpsOWASP ZAPzap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:8080
Perf testDevOpsk6k6 run perf/smoke.js
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — after Phase 3 completes
Image storeDevOpsDocker registry (see Registry section)Push completed in Phase 3 Build + Push above
Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM attachDevSecOpsoras attachoras attach --artifact-type application/vnd.cyclonedx $IMAGE@$DIGEST sbom.json
SLSA attachDevSecOpsoras attachAttached automatically by slsa-github-generator output
Promotions — DEV → TEST → STAGING → PROD (same pattern for all frameworks)
DEV: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in dev/kustomization.yaml
DEV: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from dev overlay; wait for rollout
DEV: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
DEV: Integration testsDevOpspytest / Jest / go test / curlRun integration test suite against deployed service
DEV: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers listed in environment settings
TEST: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in test/kustomization.yaml
TEST: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from test overlay
TEST: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
TEST: Integration + contract testsDevOpsPact / Dredd + test suiteRun contract and integration tests
TEST: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before staging promotion
STAGING: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in staging/kustomization.yaml
STAGING: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from staging overlay
STAGING: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
STAGING: Regression testsDevOpsfull test suiteRun full regression test suite
STAGING: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before production promotion
PROD: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in prod/kustomization.yaml
PROD: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from prod overlay
PROD: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
PROD: Argo Rollouts canaryDevOpsArgo RolloutsCanary: 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% over 30 min
PROD: Monitor → complete/rollbackDevOpsPrometheus + Argo RolloutsAuto-rollback if error rate >1% or p99 >2s

04 — Islands Architecture

Partial hydration / islands. Astro (Node output mode) or Fresh (Deno).  ·  See framework catalog →
Framework Language family Pattern Port Pkg mgr Runtime image
Astro 6.3Node.jsMulti-stage3000npm|yarn|pnpmnode:22-alpine
Fresh 2.3DenoMulti-stage8000denodenoland/deno:2.3.3
Astro 6.3 Node.js Multi-stage

SCA note: Replace npm with yarn audit or pnpm audit per ARG PM

Build note: ARG PM=pnpm → pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm run build

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev (git commit trigger)
IDE setupDevOpsESLint + Prettier + Error Lens (VS Code / WebStorm)Install from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpshadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate (every PR push)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build (no push)DevOpsdocker buildxdocker build --platform linux/amd64 --target runtime -t app:pr-${{ github.sha }} --load .
SBOM generateDevSecOpssyftsyft packages docker:app:pr-$SHA -o spdx-json > sbom.json
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL app:pr-$SHA
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpsJest / Vitestnpm test -- --coverage --coverageReporters=lcov && codecov
DASTDevSecOpsOWASP ZAPzap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:3000
Perf testDevOpsk6k6 run perf/smoke.js
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — after Phase 3 completes
Image storeDevOpsDocker registry (see Registry section)Push completed in Phase 3 Build + Push above
Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM attachDevSecOpsoras attachoras attach --artifact-type application/vnd.cyclonedx $IMAGE@$DIGEST sbom.json
SLSA attachDevSecOpsoras attachAttached automatically by slsa-github-generator output
Promotions — DEV → TEST → STAGING → PROD (same pattern for all frameworks)
DEV: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in dev/kustomization.yaml
DEV: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from dev overlay; wait for rollout
DEV: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
DEV: Integration testsDevOpspytest / Jest / go test / curlRun integration test suite against deployed service
DEV: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers listed in environment settings
TEST: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in test/kustomization.yaml
TEST: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from test overlay
TEST: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
TEST: Integration + contract testsDevOpsPact / Dredd + test suiteRun contract and integration tests
TEST: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before staging promotion
STAGING: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in staging/kustomization.yaml
STAGING: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from staging overlay
STAGING: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
STAGING: Regression testsDevOpsfull test suiteRun full regression test suite
STAGING: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before production promotion
PROD: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in prod/kustomization.yaml
PROD: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from prod overlay
PROD: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
PROD: Argo Rollouts canaryDevOpsArgo RolloutsCanary: 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% over 30 min
PROD: Monitor → complete/rollbackDevOpsPrometheus + Argo RolloutsAuto-rollback if error rate >1% or p99 >2s
Fresh 2.3 Deno Multi-stage

SCA note: Deno resolves deps from URLs — audit checks known CVEs

Build note: No separate build step — deno cache downloads and type-checks

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev (git commit trigger)
IDE setupDevOpsDeno LSP + VS Code Deno extensionInstall from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpshadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate (every PR push)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsdeno audit (deps.ts)deno audit
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpssemgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicensee (manual)deno run --allow-read tools/check-licenses.ts
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build (no push)DevOpsdocker buildxdocker build --platform linux/amd64 --target runtime -t app:pr-${{ github.sha }} --load .
SBOM generateDevSecOpssyftsyft packages docker:app:pr-$SHA -o spdx-json > sbom.json
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL app:pr-$SHA
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsdeno audit (deps.ts)deno audit
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpssemgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicensee (manual)deno run --allow-read tools/check-licenses.ts
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpsdeno testdeno test --allow-all --coverage=cov && codecov
DASTDevSecOpsOWASP ZAPzap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:8000
Perf testDevOpsk6k6 run perf/smoke.js
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — after Phase 3 completes
Image storeDevOpsDocker registry (see Registry section)Push completed in Phase 3 Build + Push above
Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM attachDevSecOpsoras attachoras attach --artifact-type application/vnd.cyclonedx $IMAGE@$DIGEST sbom.json
SLSA attachDevSecOpsoras attachAttached automatically by slsa-github-generator output

05 — Resumability

Zero-hydration resumable framework. SSR output with Node.js runtime.  ·  See framework catalog →
Framework Language family Pattern Port Pkg mgr Runtime image
Qwik 2.0Node.jsMulti-stage3000npm|yarn|pnpmnode:22-alpine
Qwik 2.0 Node.js Multi-stage

SCA note: Replace npm with yarn audit or pnpm audit per ARG PM

Build note: ARG PM=pnpm → pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm run build

06 — Edge Rendering

CI-only — bundle deployed to Cloudflare Workers or Deno Deploy. No container at runtime.  ·  See framework catalog →
Framework Language family Pattern Port Pkg mgr Runtime image
Next.js Edge 16Edge Rendering (Cloudflare / Deno Deploy)CI-onlyN/AnpmN/A
Hono 4.7Edge Rendering (Cloudflare / Deno Deploy)CI-onlyN/AnpmN/A
Remix Cloudflare 7Edge Rendering (Cloudflare / Deno Deploy)CI-onlyN/AnpmN/A
Next.js Edge 16 Edge Rendering (Cloudflare / Deno Deploy) CI-only

CI-only — no Docker image at runtime

This framework produces a platform artifact (APK / IPA / edge bundle), not a container. The pipeline runs to build and publish the artifact.

Build command: npx wrangler deploy --dry-run / deno deploy --project=app

SCA: npm audit --audit-level=high   SAST: semgrep --config=auto .

GitHub Actions example:

name: Deploy Edge on: push: branches: [main] jobs: deploy: runs-on: ubuntu-latest permissions: id-token: write contents: read steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v4 - uses: actions/setup-node@v4 with: { node-version: '22' } - run: npm ci - run: npm run build - name: Deploy to Cloudflare Workers run: npx wrangler deploy env: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CF_API_TOKEN }}

Pipeline stages (CI phases only)

Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev
IDE setupDevOpsVS Code + Cloudflare Workers extensionInstall from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpspre-commit: hadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCADevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SASTDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License scanDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scanDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets scanDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build artifactDevOpsnpxnpx wrangler deploy --dry-run / deno deploy --project=app
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCADevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SASTDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License scanDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scanDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets scanDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + deployDevOpsnpxnpx wrangler deploy --dry-run / deno deploy --project=app
TestsDevOpsVitest + wrangler devnpm test
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — N/A (no container image)
CI-only framework — no Docker image produced. Deploy artifact directly to edge/CDN/app store.
Promotions — N/A (no container image)
CI-only framework — use platform-specific deployment (wrangler deploy / eas submit / fastlane) instead of GitOps promotion.

This framework produces a platform artifact (APK / IPA / edge bundle), not a container. The pipeline runs to build and publish the artifact.

Build command: npx wrangler deploy --dry-run / deno deploy --project=app

SCA: npm audit --audit-level=high   SAST: semgrep --config=auto .

GitHub Actions example:

name: Deploy Edge on: push: branches: [main] jobs: deploy: runs-on: ubuntu-latest permissions: id-token: write contents: read steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v4 - uses: actions/setup-node@v4 with: { node-version: '22' } - run: npm ci - run: npm run build - name: Deploy to Cloudflare Workers run: npx wrangler deploy env: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CF_API_TOKEN }}

Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS

Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev
IDE setupDevOpsVS Code + Cloudflare Workers extensionInstall from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpspre-commit: hadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCADevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SASTDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License scanDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scanDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets scanDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build artifactDevOpsnpxnpx wrangler deploy --dry-run / deno deploy --project=app
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCADevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SASTDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License scanDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scanDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets scanDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + deployDevOpsnpxnpx wrangler deploy --dry-run / deno deploy --project=app
TestsDevOpsVitest + wrangler devnpm test
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — N/A (no container image)
CI-only framework — no Docker image produced. Deploy artifact directly to edge/CDN/app store.
Promotions — N/A (no container image)
CI-only framework — use platform-specific deployment (wrangler deploy / eas submit / fastlane) instead of GitOps promotion.

07 — Streaming SSR

React Suspense / HTTP streaming. Node.js runtime; same Docker pattern as SSR.  ·  See framework catalog →
Framework Language family Pattern Port Pkg mgr Runtime image
Next.js App Router 16Node.jsMulti-stage3000npm|yarn|pnpmnode:22-alpine
Remix 7Node.jsMulti-stage3000npm|yarn|pnpmnode:22-alpine
SvelteKit 2.57Node.jsMulti-stage3000npm|yarn|pnpmnode:22-alpine
Next.js App Router 16 Node.js Multi-stage

SCA note: Replace npm with yarn audit or pnpm audit per ARG PM

Build note: ARG PM=pnpm → pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm run build

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev (git commit trigger)
IDE setupDevOpsESLint + Prettier + Error Lens (VS Code / WebStorm)Install from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpshadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate (every PR push)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build (no push)DevOpsdocker buildxdocker build --platform linux/amd64 --target runtime -t app:pr-${{ github.sha }} --load .
SBOM generateDevSecOpssyftsyft packages docker:app:pr-$SHA -o spdx-json > sbom.json
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL app:pr-$SHA
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpsJest / Vitestnpm test -- --coverage --coverageReporters=lcov && codecov
DASTDevSecOpsOWASP ZAPzap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:3000
Perf testDevOpsk6k6 run perf/smoke.js
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — after Phase 3 completes
Image storeDevOpsDocker registry (see Registry section)Push completed in Phase 3 Build + Push above
Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM attachDevSecOpsoras attachoras attach --artifact-type application/vnd.cyclonedx $IMAGE@$DIGEST sbom.json
SLSA attachDevSecOpsoras attachAttached automatically by slsa-github-generator output
Promotions — DEV → TEST → STAGING → PROD (same pattern for all frameworks)
DEV: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in dev/kustomization.yaml
DEV: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from dev overlay; wait for rollout
DEV: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
DEV: Integration testsDevOpspytest / Jest / go test / curlRun integration test suite against deployed service
DEV: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers listed in environment settings
TEST: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in test/kustomization.yaml
TEST: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from test overlay
TEST: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
TEST: Integration + contract testsDevOpsPact / Dredd + test suiteRun contract and integration tests
TEST: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before staging promotion
STAGING: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in staging/kustomization.yaml
STAGING: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from staging overlay
STAGING: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
STAGING: Regression testsDevOpsfull test suiteRun full regression test suite
STAGING: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before production promotion
PROD: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in prod/kustomization.yaml
PROD: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from prod overlay
PROD: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
PROD: Argo Rollouts canaryDevOpsArgo RolloutsCanary: 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% over 30 min
PROD: Monitor → complete/rollbackDevOpsPrometheus + Argo RolloutsAuto-rollback if error rate >1% or p99 >2s

08 — Micro-frontends

Module Federation runtime or host apps. Static assets served by nginx.  ·  See framework catalog →
Framework Language family Pattern Port Pkg mgr Runtime image
Module Federation Webpack 5Node.js → nginxMulti-stage80npm|yarn|pnpmnginx:alpine
Module Federation Rspack 1Node.js → nginxMulti-stage80npm|yarn|pnpmnginx:alpine
single-spa 6.0Node.js → nginxMulti-stage80npm|yarn|pnpmnginx:alpine
