STAGING: Regression testsDevOpsfull test suiteRun full regression test suite
STAGING: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before production promotion
PROD: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in prod/kustomization.yaml
PROD: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from prod overlay
PROD: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
PROD: Argo Rollouts canaryDevOpsArgo RolloutsCanary: 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% over 30 min
PROD: Monitor → complete/rollbackDevOpsPrometheus + Argo RolloutsAuto-rollback if error rate >1% or p99 >2s
Module Federation Rspack 1 Node.js → nginx Multi-stage

SCA note: Replace npm with yarn audit or pnpm audit per ARG PM

Build note: Output served by nginx — no Node.js at runtime

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev (git commit trigger)
IDE setupDevOpsESLint + Prettier + Error Lens (VS Code / WebStorm)Install from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpshadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate (every PR push)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build (no push)DevOpsdocker buildxdocker build --platform linux/amd64 --target runtime -t app:pr-${{ github.sha }} --load .
SBOM generateDevSecOpssyftsyft packages docker:app:pr-$SHA -o spdx-json > sbom.json
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL app:pr-$SHA
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpsJest / Vitest / Playwrightnpm test -- --coverage && codecov
DASTDevSecOpsOWASP ZAPzap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:8080
Perf testDevOpsk6k6 run perf/smoke.js
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — after Phase 3 completes
Image storeDevOpsDocker registry (see Registry section)Push completed in Phase 3 Build + Push above
Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM attachDevSecOpsoras attachoras attach --artifact-type application/vnd.cyclonedx $IMAGE@$DIGEST sbom.json
SLSA attachDevSecOpsoras attachAttached automatically by slsa-github-generator output
Promotions — DEV → TEST → STAGING → PROD (same pattern for all frameworks)
DEV: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in dev/kustomization.yaml
DEV: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from dev overlay; wait for rollout
DEV: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
DEV: Integration testsDevOpspytest / Jest / go test / curlRun integration test suite against deployed service
DEV: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers listed in environment settings
TEST: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in test/kustomization.yaml
TEST: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from test overlay
TEST: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
TEST: Integration + contract testsDevOpsPact / Dredd + test suiteRun contract and integration tests
TEST: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before staging promotion
STAGING: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in staging/kustomization.yaml
STAGING: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from staging overlay
STAGING: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
STAGING: Regression testsDevOpsfull test suiteRun full regression test suite
STAGING: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before production promotion
PROD: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in prod/kustomization.yaml
PROD: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from prod overlay
PROD: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
PROD: Argo Rollouts canaryDevOpsArgo RolloutsCanary: 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% over 30 min
PROD: Monitor → complete/rollbackDevOpsPrometheus + Argo RolloutsAuto-rollback if error rate >1% or p99 >2s
single-spa 6.0 Node.js → nginx Multi-stage

SCA note: Replace npm with yarn audit or pnpm audit per ARG PM

Build note: Output served by nginx — no Node.js at runtime

09 — Cross-platform JS

CI-only — mobile builds produce APK / IPA artifacts, not Docker images.  ·  See framework catalog →
Framework Language family Pattern Port Pkg mgr Runtime image
React Native 0.79Mobile (React Native / Expo / Ionic)CI-onlyN/AnpmN/A
Expo 52Mobile (React Native / Expo / Ionic)CI-onlyN/AnpmN/A
Ionic 8Mobile (React Native / Expo / Ionic)CI-onlyN/AnpmN/A
React Native 0.79 Mobile (React Native / Expo / Ionic) CI-only

CI-only — no Docker image at runtime

This framework produces a platform artifact (APK / IPA / edge bundle), not a container. The pipeline runs to build and publish the artifact.

Build command: npx expo build:android / react-native build-android --mode=release

SCA: npm audit --audit-level=high   SAST: semgrep --config=auto .

GitHub Actions example:

name: Build Mobile on: push: branches: [main] jobs: build-android: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v4 - uses: actions/setup-node@v4 with: { node-version: '22' } - run: npm ci - name: Build Android APK run: npx expo build:android --non-interactive # or: react-native build-android --mode=release - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 with: name: android-apk path: android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/*.apk

Pipeline stages (CI phases only)

Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev
IDE setupDevOpsVS Code + React Native Tools + FlipperInstall from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpspre-commit: hadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCADevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SASTDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License scanDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scanDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets scanDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build artifactDevOpsnpxnpx expo build:android / react-native build-android --mode=release
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCADevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SASTDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License scanDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scanDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets scanDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + deployDevOpsnpxnpx expo build:android / react-native build-android --mode=release
TestsDevOpsJest + Detox (E2E)npm test && npx detox test --configuration android.emu.release
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — N/A (no container image)
CI-only framework — no Docker image produced. Deploy artifact directly to edge/CDN/app store.
Promotions — N/A (no container image)
CI-only framework — use platform-specific deployment (wrangler deploy / eas submit / fastlane) instead of GitOps promotion.
Expo 52 Mobile (React Native / Expo / Ionic) CI-only

CI-only — no Docker image at runtime

This framework produces a platform artifact (APK / IPA / edge bundle), not a container. The pipeline runs to build and publish the artifact.

Build command: npx expo build:android / react-native build-android --mode=release

10 — Cross-platform non-JS

CI-only — Flutter, .NET MAUI, and KMP produce mobile artifacts, not Docker images.  ·  See framework catalog →
Framework Language family Pattern Port Pkg mgr Runtime image
Flutter 3.44Mobile (Flutter / .NET MAUI / KMP)CI-onlyN/ApubN/A
.NET MAUI 10Mobile (Flutter / .NET MAUI / KMP)CI-onlyN/ANuGetN/A
Kotlin Multiplatform 2.1Mobile (Flutter / .NET MAUI / KMP)CI-onlyN/AGradleN/A
Flutter 3.44 Mobile (Flutter / .NET MAUI / KMP) CI-only

CI-only — no Docker image at runtime

This framework produces a platform artifact (APK / IPA / edge bundle), not a container. The pipeline runs to build and publish the artifact.

Build command: flutter build apk --release / dotnet build -c Release

SCA: flutter pub audit   SAST: dart analyze

GitHub Actions example:

name: Build Flutter on: push: branches: [main] jobs: build-android: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v4 - uses: subosito/flutter-action@v2 with: { flutter-version: '3.44.0' } - run: flutter pub get - run: flutter test --coverage - run: flutter build apk --release - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 with: name: flutter-apk path: build/app/outputs/apk/release/*.apk

Pipeline stages (CI phases only)

Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev
IDE setupDevOpsAndroid Studio / Xcode / VS Code + Flutter / Kotlin pluginInstall from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpspre-commit: hadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCADevSecOpsflutter pub audit / OWASP DCflutter pub audit
SASTDevSecOpsdart analyze, semgrepdart analyze && semgrep --config=auto .
License scanDevSecOpsflutter pub deps / licenseeflutter pub deps --json | jq
IaC scanDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets scanDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build artifactDevOpsflutterflutter build apk --release / dotnet build -c Release
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCADevSecOpsflutter pub audit / OWASP DCflutter pub audit
SASTDevSecOpsdart analyze, semgrepdart analyze && semgrep --config=auto .
License scanDevSecOpsflutter pub deps / licenseeflutter pub deps --json | jq
IaC scanDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets scanDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + deployDevOpsflutterflutter build apk --release / dotnet build -c Release
TestsDevOpsflutter test / MSTest / JUnitflutter test --coverage
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — N/A (no container image)
CI-only framework — no Docker image produced. Deploy artifact directly to edge/CDN/app store.
Promotions — N/A (no container image)
CI-only framework — use platform-specific deployment (wrangler deploy / eas submit / fastlane) instead of GitOps promotion.
.NET MAUI 10 Mobile (Flutter / .NET MAUI / KMP) CI-only

CI-only — no Docker image at runtime

This framework produces a platform artifact (APK / IPA / edge bundle), not a container. The pipeline runs to build and publish the artifact.

Build command: flutter build apk --release / dotnet build -c Release

SCA: flutter pub audit   SAST: dart analyze

GitHub Actions example:

name: Build Flutter on: push: branches: [main] jobs: build-android: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v4 - uses: subosito/flutter-action@v2 with: { flutter-version: '3.44.0' } - run: flutter pub get - run: flutter test --coverage - run: flutter build apk --release - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 with: name: flutter-apk path: build/app/outputs/apk/release/*.apk

Pipeline stages (CI phases only)

Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev
IDE setupDevOpsAndroid Studio / Xcode / VS Code + Flutter / Kotlin pluginInstall from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpspre-commit: hadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCADevSecOpsflutter pub audit / OWASP DCflutter pub audit
SASTDevSecOpsdart analyze, semgrepdart analyze && semgrep --config=auto .
License scanDevSecOpsflutter pub deps / licenseeflutter pub deps --json | jq
IaC scanDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets scanDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build artifactDevOpsflutterflutter build apk --release / dotnet build -c Release
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCADevSecOpsflutter pub audit / OWASP DCflutter pub audit
SASTDevSecOpsdart analyze, semgrepdart analyze && semgrep --config=auto .
License scanDevSecOpsflutter pub deps / licenseeflutter pub deps --json | jq
IaC scanDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets scanDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + deployDevOpsflutterflutter build apk --release / dotnet build -c Release
TestsDevOpsflutter test / MSTest / JUnitflutter test --coverage
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status

11 — Native iOS

CI-only — requires macOS runner. No Linux container possible for iOS builds.  ·  See framework catalog →
Framework Language family Pattern Port Pkg mgr Runtime image
Swift / SwiftUI 6Native iOS (Swift / Obj-C)CI-onlyN/ASPMN/A
Objective-C UIKit SDK 17Native iOS (Swift / Obj-C)CI-onlyN/ACocoaPodsN/A
Swift / SwiftUI 6 Native iOS (Swift / Obj-C) CI-only

CI-only — no Docker image at runtime

This framework produces a platform artifact (APK / IPA / edge bundle), not a container. The pipeline runs to build and publish the artifact.

Build command: xcodebuild -scheme MyApp -configuration Release archive

SCA: swift package audit   SAST: swiftlint lint --strict

GitHub Actions example:

name: Build iOS on: push: branches: [main] jobs: build-ios: runs-on: macos-latest # macOS required — Linux cannot build iOS steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v4 - name: Select Xcode run: sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode_16.app - name: Build & Archive run: | xcodebuild -scheme MyApp -configuration Release -archivePath $RUNNER_TEMP/MyApp.xcarchive archive CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY="" CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 with: name: ios-archive path: ${{ runner.temp }}/MyApp.xcarchive

Pipeline stages (CI phases only)

Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot

License scanDevSecOpsswift-package-licenseswift-package-license generate
IaC scanDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets scanDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build artifactDevOpsxcodebuildxcodebuild -scheme MyApp -configuration Release archive
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCADevSecOpsswift package auditswift package audit
SASTDevSecOpsSwiftLint, semgrepswiftlint lint --strict && semgrep --config=auto .
License scanDevSecOpsswift-package-licenseswift-package-license generate
IaC scanDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets scanDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + deployDevOpsxcodebuildxcodebuild -scheme MyApp -configuration Release archive
TestsDevOpsXCTest + XCUITestxcodebuild test -scheme MyApp -destination "platform=iOS Simulator"

12 — Native Android

CI-only — Gradle builds produce APK / AAB. ubuntu-latest runner sufficient.  ·  See framework catalog →
Framework Language family Pattern Port Pkg mgr Runtime image
Kotlin Jetpack Compose 2.0Native Android (Kotlin / Java)CI-onlyN/AGradleN/A
Java Android SDK 17Native Android (Kotlin / Java)CI-onlyN/AGradleN/A
Kotlin Jetpack Compose 2.0 Native Android (Kotlin / Java) CI-only

CI-only — no Docker image at runtime

This framework produces a platform artifact (APK / IPA / edge bundle), not a container. The pipeline runs to build and publish the artifact.

Build command: ./gradlew assembleRelease

SCA: ./gradlew dependencyCheckAnalyze   SAST: ./gradlew lint detekt

GitHub Actions example:

name: Build Android on: push: branches: [main] jobs: build: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v4 - uses: actions/setup-java@v4 with: { java-version: '17', distribution: 'temurin' } - name: Build Release AAB run: ./gradlew bundleRelease - name: Sign AAB uses: r0adkll/sign-android-release@v1 with: releaseDirectory: app/build/outputs/bundle/release signingKeyBase64: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY }} alias: ${{ secrets.KEY_ALIAS }}

Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action

Registry — N/A (no container image)
CI-only framework — no Docker image produced. Deploy artifact directly to edge/CDN/app store.
Promotions — N/A (no container image)
CI-only framework — use platform-specific deployment (wrangler deploy / eas submit / fastlane) instead of GitOps promotion.

13 — PWA

Progressive Web Apps. Service worker + manifest. Static output served by nginx.  ·  See framework catalog →
Framework Language family Pattern Port Pkg mgr Runtime image
Workbox 7.3Node.js → nginxMulti-stage80npm|yarn|pnpmnginx:alpine
Vite PWA Plugin 0.21Node.js → nginxMulti-stage80npm|yarn|pnpmnginx:alpine
Workbox 7.3 Node.js → nginx Multi-stage

SCA note: Replace npm with yarn audit or pnpm audit per ARG PM

Build note: Output served by nginx — no Node.js at runtime

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev (git commit trigger)
IDE setupDevOpsESLint + Prettier + Error Lens (VS Code / WebStorm)Install from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpshadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate (every PR push)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build (no push)DevOpsdocker buildxdocker build --platform linux/amd64 --target runtime -t app:pr-${{ github.sha }} --load .
SBOM generateDevSecOpssyftsyft packages docker:app:pr-$SHA -o spdx-json > sbom.json
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL app:pr-$SHA
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpsJest / Vitest / Playwrightnpm test -- --coverage && codecov
DASTDevSecOpsOWASP ZAPzap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:8080
Perf testDevOpsk6k6 run perf/smoke.js
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — after Phase 3 completes
Image storeDevOpsDocker registry (see Registry section)Push completed in Phase 3 Build + Push above
Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM attachDevSecOpsoras attachoras attach --artifact-type application/vnd.cyclonedx $IMAGE@$DIGEST sbom.json
SLSA attachDevSecOpsoras attachAttached automatically by slsa-github-generator output
Promotions — DEV → TEST → STAGING → PROD (same pattern for all frameworks)
DEV: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in dev/kustomization.yaml
DEV: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from dev overlay; wait for rollout
DEV: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
DEV: Integration testsDevOpspytest / Jest / go test / curlRun integration test suite against deployed service
DEV: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers listed in environment settings
TEST: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in test/kustomization.yaml
TEST: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from test overlay
TEST: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
TEST: Integration + contract testsDevOpsPact / Dredd + test suiteRun contract and integration tests
TEST: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before staging promotion
STAGING: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in staging/kustomization.yaml
STAGING: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from staging overlay
STAGING: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
STAGING: Regression testsDevOpsfull test suiteRun full regression test suite
STAGING: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before production promotion
PROD: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in prod/kustomization.yaml
PROD: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from prod overlay
PROD: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
PROD: Argo Rollouts canaryDevOpsArgo RolloutsCanary: 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% over 30 min
PROD: Monitor → complete/rollbackDevOpsPrometheus + Argo RolloutsAuto-rollback if error rate >1% or p99 >2s
Vite PWA Plugin 0.21 Node.js → nginx Multi-stage

SCA note: Replace npm with yarn audit or pnpm audit per ARG PM

Build note: Output served by nginx — no Node.js at runtime

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev (git commit trigger)
IDE setupDevOpsESLint + Prettier + Error Lens (VS Code / WebStorm)Install from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpshadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate (every PR push)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build (no push)DevOpsdocker buildxdocker build --platform linux/amd64 --target runtime -t app:pr-${{ github.sha }} --load .
SBOM generateDevSecOpssyftsyft packages docker:app:pr-$SHA -o spdx-json > sbom.json
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL app:pr-$SHA
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpsJest / Vitest / Playwrightnpm test -- --coverage && codecov
DASTDevSecOpsOWASP ZAPzap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:8080
Perf testDevOpsk6k6 run perf/smoke.js
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — after Phase 3 completes
Image storeDevOpsDocker registry (see Registry section)Push completed in Phase 3 Build + Push above
Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM attachDevSecOpsoras attachoras attach --artifact-type application/vnd.cyclonedx $IMAGE@$DIGEST sbom.json
SLSA attachDevSecOpsoras attachAttached automatically by slsa-github-generator output
Promotions — DEV → TEST → STAGING → PROD (same pattern for all frameworks)
DEV: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in dev/kustomization.yaml
DEV: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from dev overlay; wait for rollout
DEV: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
DEV: Integration testsDevOpspytest / Jest / go test / curlRun integration test suite against deployed service
DEV: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers listed in environment settings
TEST: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in test/kustomization.yaml
TEST: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from test overlay
TEST: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
TEST: Integration + contract testsDevOpsPact / Dredd + test suiteRun contract and integration tests
TEST: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before staging promotion
STAGING: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in staging/kustomization.yaml
STAGING: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from staging overlay
STAGING: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
STAGING: Regression testsDevOpsfull test suiteRun full regression test suite
STAGING: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before production promotion
PROD: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in prod/kustomization.yaml
PROD: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from prod overlay
PROD: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
PROD: Argo Rollouts canaryDevOpsArgo RolloutsCanary: 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% over 30 min
PROD: Monitor → complete/rollbackDevOpsPrometheus + Argo RolloutsAuto-rollback if error rate >1% or p99 >2s

14 — Node / Deno / Bun

Backend APIs and servers. Node runtime or Deno/Bun alternatives.  ·  See framework catalog →
Framework Language family Pattern Port Pkg mgr Runtime image
Express 5.0Node.jsMulti-stage3000npm|yarn|pnpmnode:22-alpine
Fastify 5.2Node.jsMulti-stage3000npm|yarn|pnpmnode:22-alpine
NestJS 11.0Node.jsMulti-stage3000npm|yarn|pnpmnode:22-alpine
Hono 4.7Node.jsMulti-stage3000npm|yarn|pnpmnode:22-alpine
Deno 2.3DenoMulti-stage8000denodenoland/deno:2.3.3
Elysia 1.2BunMulti-stage3000bunoven/bun:1.1-alpine
Express 5.0 Node.js Multi-stage

Hono 4.7 Node.js Multi-stage

SCA note: Replace npm with yarn audit or pnpm audit per ARG PM

Build note: ARG PM=pnpm → pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm run build

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev (git commit trigger)
IDE setupDevOpsESLint + Prettier + Error Lens (VS Code / WebStorm)Install from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpshadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate (every PR push)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build (no push)DevOpsdocker buildxdocker build --platform linux/amd64 --target runtime -t app:pr-${{ github.sha }} --load .
SBOM generateDevSecOpssyftsyft packages docker:app:pr-$SHA -o spdx-json > sbom.json
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL app:pr-$SHA
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsnpm auditnpm audit --audit-level=high
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpseslint-plugin-security, semgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense-checkernpx license-checker --production --failOn "GPL;AGPL"
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpsJest / Vitestnpm test -- --coverage --coverageReporters=lcov && codecov
DASTDevSecOpsOWASP ZAPzap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:3000
Perf testDevOpsk6k6 run perf/smoke.js
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — after Phase 3 completes
Image storeDevOpsDocker registry (see Registry section)Push completed in Phase 3 Build + Push above
Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM attachDevSecOpsoras attachoras attach --artifact-type application/vnd.cyclonedx $IMAGE@$DIGEST sbom.json
SLSA attachDevSecOpsoras attachAttached automatically by slsa-github-generator output
Promotions — DEV → TEST → STAGING → PROD (same pattern for all frameworks)
DEV: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in dev/kustomization.yaml
DEV: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from dev overlay; wait for rollout
DEV: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
DEV: Integration testsDevOpspytest / Jest / go test / curlRun integration test suite against deployed service
DEV: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers listed in environment settings
TEST: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in test/kustomization.yaml
TEST: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from test overlay
TEST: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
TEST: Integration + contract testsDevOpsPact / Dredd + test suiteRun contract and integration tests
TEST: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before staging promotion
STAGING: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in staging/kustomization.yaml
STAGING: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from staging overlay
STAGING: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
STAGING: Regression testsDevOpsfull test suiteRun full regression test suite
STAGING: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before production promotion
PROD: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in prod/kustomization.yaml
PROD: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from prod overlay
PROD: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
PROD: Argo Rollouts canaryDevOpsArgo RolloutsCanary: 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% over 30 min
PROD: Monitor → complete/rollbackDevOpsPrometheus + Argo RolloutsAuto-rollback if error rate >1% or p99 >2s
Deno 2.3 Deno Multi-stage

SCA note: Deno resolves deps from URLs — audit checks known CVEs

Build note: No separate build step — deno cache downloads and type-checks

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev (git commit trigger)
IDE setupDevOpsDeno LSP + VS Code Deno extensionInstall from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpshadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate (every PR push)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsdeno audit (deps.ts)deno audit
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpssemgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicensee (manual)deno run --allow-read tools/check-licenses.ts
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build (no push)DevOpsdocker buildxdocker build --platform linux/amd64 --target runtime -t app:pr-${{ github.sha }} --load .
SBOM generateDevSecOpssyftsyft packages docker:app:pr-$SHA -o spdx-json > sbom.json
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL app:pr-$SHA
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsdeno audit (deps.ts)deno audit
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpssemgrepsemgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicensee (manual)deno run --allow-read tools/check-licenses.ts
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpsdeno testdeno test --allow-all --coverage=cov && codecov
DASTDevSecOpsOWASP ZAPzap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:8000
Perf testDevOpsk6k6 run perf/smoke.js
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — after Phase 3 completes
Image storeDevOpsDocker registry (see Registry section)Push completed in Phase 3 Build + Push above
Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM attachDevSecOpsoras attachoras attach --artifact-type application/vnd.cyclonedx $IMAGE@$DIGEST sbom.json
SLSA attachDevSecOpsoras attachAttached automatically by slsa-github-generator output
Promotions — DEV → TEST → STAGING → PROD (same pattern for all frameworks)
DEV: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in dev/kustomization.yaml
DEV: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from dev overlay; wait for rollout
DEV: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
DEV: Integration testsDevOpspytest / Jest / go test / curlRun integration test suite against deployed service
DEV: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers listed in environment settings
TEST: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in test/kustomization.yaml
TEST: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from test overlay
TEST: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST

Elysia 1.2 Bun Multi-stage

SCA note: Bun reads package.json lockfile for known CVEs

Build note: Single-binary runtime — no separate build step needed

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)

15 — Python

Python web frameworks. Multi-stage build to python:3.12-slim runtime.  ·  See framework catalog →
Framework Language family Pattern Port Pkg mgr Runtime image
FastAPI 0.115PythonMulti-stage8080pip|poetry|uvpython:3.12-slim
Django 5.2PythonMulti-stage8080pip|poetry|uvpython:3.12-slim
Flask 3.1PythonMulti-stage8080pip|poetry|uvpython:3.12-slim
Starlette 0.41PythonMulti-stage8080pip|poetry|uvpython:3.12-slim
FastAPI 0.115 Python Multi-stage

SCA note: Alternative: safety check -r requirements.txt

Build note: ARG PM=poetry → poetry install --no-dev; ARG PM=uv → uv pip install

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev (git commit trigger)
IDE setupDevOpsPylance + Black + Ruff + mypy (VS Code / PyCharm)Install from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpshadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate (every PR push)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpspip-auditpip-audit --vulnerability-service pypi
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpsbandit, semgrepbandit -r . -ll && semgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpspip-licensespip-licenses --fail-on "GPL;AGPL" --format=plain-vertical
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build (no push)DevOpsdocker buildxdocker build --platform linux/amd64 --target runtime -t app:pr-${{ github.sha }} --load .
SBOM generateDevSecOpssyftsyft packages docker:app:pr-$SHA -o spdx-json > sbom.json
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL app:pr-$SHA
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpspip-auditpip-audit --vulnerability-service pypi
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpsbandit, semgrepbandit -r . -ll && semgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpspip-licensespip-licenses --fail-on "GPL;AGPL" --format=plain-vertical
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpspytest + coverage.pypytest --cov=. --cov-report=xml && codecov

PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpspip-auditpip-audit --vulnerability-service pypi
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpsbandit, semgrepbandit -r . -ll && semgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpspip-licensespip-licenses --fail-on "GPL;AGPL" --format=plain-vertical
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpspytest + coverage.pypytest --cov=. --cov-report=xml && codecov
DASTDevSecOpsOWASP ZAPzap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:8080
Perf testDevOpsk6k6 run perf/smoke.js
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — after Phase 3 completes
Image storeDevOpsDocker registry (see Registry section)Push completed in Phase 3 Build + Push above
Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM attachDevSecOpsoras attachoras attach --artifact-type application/vnd.cyclonedx $IMAGE@$DIGEST sbom.json
SLSA attachDevSecOpsoras attachAttached automatically by slsa-github-generator output
Promotions — DEV → TEST → STAGING → PROD (same pattern for all frameworks)
DEV: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in dev/kustomization.yaml
DEV: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from dev overlay; wait for rollout
DEV: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
DEV: Integration testsDevOpspytest / Jest / go test / curlRun integration test suite against deployed service
DEV: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers listed in environment settings
TEST: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in test/kustomization.yaml
TEST: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from test overlay
TEST: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
TEST: Integration + contract testsDevOpsPact / Dredd + test suiteRun contract and integration tests
TEST: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before staging promotion
STAGING: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in staging/kustomization.yaml
STAGING: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from staging overlay
STAGING: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
STAGING: Regression testsDevOpsfull test suiteRun full regression test suite
STAGING: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before production promotion
PROD: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in prod/kustomization.yaml
PROD: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from prod overlay
PROD: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
PROD: Argo Rollouts canaryDevOpsArgo RolloutsCanary: 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% over 30 min
PROD: Monitor → complete/rollbackDevOpsPrometheus + Argo RolloutsAuto-rollback if error rate >1% or p99 >2s
Flask 3.1 Python Multi-stage

SCA note: Alternative: safety check -r requirements.txt

Build note: ARG PM=poetry → poetry install --no-dev; ARG PM=uv → uv pip install

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev (git commit trigger)
IDE setupDevOpsPylance + Black + Ruff + mypy (VS Code / PyCharm)Install from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpshadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate (every PR push)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpspip-auditpip-audit --vulnerability-service pypi
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpsbandit, semgrepbandit -r . -ll && semgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpspip-licensespip-licenses --fail-on "GPL;AGPL" --format=plain-vertical
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build (no push)DevOpsdocker buildxdocker build --platform linux/amd64 --target runtime -t app:pr-${{ github.sha }} --load .
SBOM generateDevSecOpssyftsyft packages docker:app:pr-$SHA -o spdx-json > sbom.json
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL app:pr-$SHA
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpspip-auditpip-audit --vulnerability-service pypi
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpsbandit, semgrepbandit -r . -ll && semgrep --config=auto .

Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .

Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -

Tests + CodecovDevOpspytest + coverage.pypytest --cov=. --cov-report=xml && codecov

Perf testDevOpsk6k6 run perf/smoke.js

Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST

Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM attachDevSecOpsoras attachoras attach --artifact-type application/vnd.cyclonedx $IMAGE@$DIGEST sbom.json
SLSA attachDevSecOpsoras attachAttached automatically by slsa-github-generator output
Promotions — DEV → TEST → STAGING → PROD (same pattern for all frameworks)
DEV: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in dev/kustomization.yaml
DEV: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from dev overlay; wait for rollout
DEV: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
DEV: Integration testsDevOpspytest / Jest / go test / curlRun integration test suite against deployed service
DEV: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers listed in environment settings
TEST: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in test/kustomization.yaml
TEST: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from test overlay
TEST: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
TEST: Integration + contract testsDevOpsPact / Dredd + test suiteRun contract and integration tests
TEST: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before staging promotion
STAGING: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in staging/kustomization.yaml
STAGING: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from staging overlay
STAGING: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
STAGING: Regression testsDevOpsfull test suiteRun full regression test suite
STAGING: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before production promotion
PROD: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in prod/kustomization.yaml
PROD: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from prod overlay
PROD: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
PROD: Argo Rollouts canaryDevOpsArgo RolloutsCanary: 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% over 30 min
PROD: Monitor → complete/rollbackDevOpsPrometheus + Argo RolloutsAuto-rollback if error rate >1% or p99 >2s
Fiber 3.0 Go Multi-stage

SCA note: Checks the Go vulnerability database for known CVEs in deps

Build note: Static binary — no runtime libc needed. Output: single binary.

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev (git commit trigger)
IDE setupDevOpsgopls + staticcheck + golangci-lint (VS Code / GoLand)Install from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpshadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate (every PR push)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsgovulncheckgovulncheck ./...
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpsgosec, semgrepgosec ./... && semgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpsgo-licensesgo-licenses check ./... --allowed_licenses=Apache-2.0,MIT,BSD-3-Clause
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build (no push)DevOpsdocker buildxdocker build --platform linux/amd64 --target runtime -t app:pr-${{ github.sha }} --load .
SBOM generateDevSecOpssyftsyft packages docker:app:pr-$SHA -o spdx-json > sbom.json
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL app:pr-$SHA
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsgovulncheckgovulncheck ./...
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpsgosec, semgrepgosec ./... && semgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpsgo-licensesgo-licenses check ./... --allowed_licenses=Apache-2.0,MIT,BSD-3-Clause
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpsgo testgo test -v -race -coverprofile=coverage.out ./... && codecov
DASTDevSecOpsOWASP ZAPzap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:8080
Perf testDevOpsk6k6 run perf/smoke.js
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — after Phase 3 completes
Image storeDevOpsDocker registry (see Registry section)Push completed in Phase 3 Build + Push above
Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM attachDevSecOpsoras attachoras attach --artifact-type application/vnd.cyclonedx $IMAGE@$DIGEST sbom.json
SLSA attachDevSecOpsoras attachAttached automatically by slsa-github-generator output
Promotions — DEV → TEST → STAGING → PROD (same pattern for all frameworks)
DEV: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in dev/kustomization.yaml
DEV: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from dev overlay; wait for rollout
DEV: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
DEV: Integration testsDevOpspytest / Jest / go test / curlRun integration test suite against deployed service
DEV: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers listed in environment settings
TEST: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in test/kustomization.yaml
TEST: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from test overlay
TEST: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
TEST: Integration + contract testsDevOpsPact / Dredd + test suiteRun contract and integration tests
TEST: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before staging promotion
STAGING: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in staging/kustomization.yaml
STAGING: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from staging overlay
STAGING: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
STAGING: Regression testsDevOpsfull test suiteRun full regression test suite
STAGING: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before production promotion
PROD: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in prod/kustomization.yaml
PROD: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from prod overlay
PROD: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
PROD: Argo Rollouts canaryDevOpsArgo RolloutsCanary: 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% over 30 min
PROD: Monitor → complete/rollbackDevOpsPrometheus + Argo RolloutsAuto-rollback if error rate >1% or p99 >2s

PROD: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from prod overlay
PROD: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
PROD: Argo Rollouts canaryDevOpsArgo RolloutsCanary: 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% over 30 min
PROD: Monitor → complete/rollbackDevOpsPrometheus + Argo RolloutsAuto-rollback if error rate >1% or p99 >2s
Micronaut 5.0 Java (JVM) Multi-stage

SCA note: Gradle: ./gradlew dependencyCheckAnalyze

Build note: ARG BUILD_TOOL=gradle → ./gradlew bootJar; produces fat JAR

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev (git commit trigger)
IDE setupDevOpsIntelliJ IDEA + SonarLint / VS Code Java Extension PackInstall from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpshadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate (every PR push)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsOWASP Dependency-Checkmvn org.owasp:dependency-check-maven:check
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpsSpotBugs + PMD, semgrepmvn spotbugs:check pmd:check && semgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense-maven-pluginmvn license:check
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build (no push)DevOpsdocker buildxdocker build --platform linux/amd64 --target runtime -t app:pr-${{ github.sha }} --load .
SBOM generateDevSecOpssyftsyft packages docker:app:pr-$SHA -o spdx-json > sbom.json
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL app:pr-$SHA
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsOWASP Dependency-Checkmvn org.owasp:dependency-check-maven:check
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpsSpotBugs + PMD, semgrepmvn spotbugs:check pmd:check && semgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense-maven-pluginmvn license:check
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpsJUnit 5 + JaCoComvn test -Pcoverage && codecov
DASTDevSecOpsOWASP ZAPzap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:8080
Perf testDevOpsk6 / Gatlingk6 run perf/smoke.js
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — after Phase 3 completes
Image storeDevOpsDocker registry (see Registry section)Push completed in Phase 3 Build + Push above
Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM attachDevSecOpsoras attachoras attach --artifact-type application/vnd.cyclonedx $IMAGE@$DIGEST sbom.json
SLSA attachDevSecOpsoras attachAttached automatically by slsa-github-generator output
Promotions — DEV → TEST → STAGING → PROD (same pattern for all frameworks)
DEV: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in dev/kustomization.yaml
DEV: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from dev overlay; wait for rollout
DEV: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
DEV: Integration testsDevOpspytest / Jest / go test / curlRun integration test suite against deployed service
DEV: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers listed in environment settings
TEST: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in test/kustomization.yaml
TEST: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from test overlay
TEST: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
TEST: Integration + contract testsDevOpsPact / Dredd + test suiteRun contract and integration tests
TEST: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before staging promotion
STAGING: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in staging/kustomization.yaml
STAGING: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from staging overlay
STAGING: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
STAGING: Regression testsDevOpsfull test suiteRun full regression test suite
STAGING: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before production promotion
PROD: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in prod/kustomization.yaml
PROD: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from prod overlay
PROD: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
PROD: Argo Rollouts canaryDevOpsArgo RolloutsCanary: 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% over 30 min
PROD: Monitor → complete/rollbackDevOpsPrometheus + Argo RolloutsAuto-rollback if error rate >1% or p99 >2s

Phase 1 — Local Dev (git commit trigger)
IDE setupDevOpsVisual Studio 2022 / VS Code + C# Dev Kit + SonarLintInstall from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpshadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate (every PR push)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsdotnet list package --vulnerabledotnet list package --vulnerable --include-transitive
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpsRoslyn Security Analyzers, semgrepdotnet build /p:TreatWarningsAsErrors=true && semgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpsdotnet-project-licensesdotnet-project-licenses -i . --use-project-assets-json
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build (no push)DevOpsdocker buildxdocker build --platform linux/amd64 --target runtime -t app:pr-${{ github.sha }} --load .
SBOM generateDevSecOpssyftsyft packages docker:app:pr-$SHA -o spdx-json > sbom.json
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL app:pr-$SHA
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsdotnet list package --vulnerabledotnet list package --vulnerable --include-transitive
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpsRoslyn Security Analyzers, semgrepdotnet build /p:TreatWarningsAsErrors=true && semgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpsdotnet-project-licensesdotnet-project-licenses -i . --use-project-assets-json
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpsxUnit / NUnit + coverletdotnet test --collect:"XPlat Code Coverage" && codecov
DASTDevSecOpsOWASP ZAPzap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:8080
Perf testDevOpsk6 / NBomberk6 run perf/smoke.js
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — after Phase 3 completes
Image storeDevOpsDocker registry (see Registry section)Push completed in Phase 3 Build + Push above
Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM attachDevSecOpsoras attachoras attach --artifact-type application/vnd.cyclonedx $IMAGE@$DIGEST sbom.json
SLSA attachDevSecOpsoras attachAttached automatically by slsa-github-generator output
Promotions — DEV → TEST → STAGING → PROD (same pattern for all frameworks)
DEV: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in dev/kustomization.yaml
DEV: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from dev overlay; wait for rollout
DEV: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
DEV: Integration testsDevOpspytest / Jest / go test / curlRun integration test suite against deployed service
DEV: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers listed in environment settings
TEST: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in test/kustomization.yaml
TEST: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from test overlay
TEST: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
TEST: Integration + contract testsDevOpsPact / Dredd + test suiteRun contract and integration tests
TEST: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before staging promotion
STAGING: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in staging/kustomization.yaml
STAGING: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from staging overlay
STAGING: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
STAGING: Regression testsDevOpsfull test suiteRun full regression test suite
STAGING: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before production promotion
PROD: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in prod/kustomization.yaml
PROD: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from prod overlay
PROD: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
PROD: Argo Rollouts canaryDevOpsArgo RolloutsCanary: 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% over 30 min
PROD: Monitor → complete/rollbackDevOpsPrometheus + Argo RolloutsAuto-rollback if error rate >1% or p99 >2s

20 — Rust

Rust web frameworks. musl static build → scratch runtime.  ·  See framework catalog →
Framework Language family Pattern Port Pkg mgr Runtime image
Axum 0.8RustMulti-stage8080cargoscratch
Actix-web 4.9RustMulti-stage8080cargoscratch
Axum 0.8 Rust Multi-stage

SCA note: Checks RustSec advisory database for vulnerable crate versions

Build note: Statically linked via musl target → deploys to scratch

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev (git commit trigger)
IDE setupDevOpsrust-analyzer + Clippy + VS Code Rust extensionInstall from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpshadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner

License ↗ parallelDevSecOpscargo-denycargo deny check licenses
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
