Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all

License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense_finderlicense_finder --decisions-file=doc/dependency_decisions.yml
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpsRSpec + SimpleCovbundle exec rspec --format progress --format RspecJunitFormatter && codecov
DASTDevSecOpsOWASP ZAPzap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:3000
Perf testDevOpsk6k6 run perf/smoke.js
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — after Phase 3 completes
Image storeDevOpsDocker registry (see Registry section)Push completed in Phase 3 Build + Push above
Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM attachDevSecOpsoras attachoras attach --artifact-type application/vnd.cyclonedx $IMAGE@$DIGEST sbom.json
SLSA attachDevSecOpsoras attachAttached automatically by slsa-github-generator output
Promotions — DEV → TEST → STAGING → PROD (same pattern for all frameworks)
DEV: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in dev/kustomization.yaml
DEV: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from dev overlay; wait for rollout
DEV: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
DEV: Integration testsDevOpspytest / Jest / go test / curlRun integration test suite against deployed service
DEV: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers listed in environment settings
TEST: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in test/kustomization.yaml
TEST: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from test overlay
TEST: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
TEST: Integration + contract testsDevOpsPact / Dredd + test suiteRun contract and integration tests
TEST: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before staging promotion
STAGING: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in staging/kustomization.yaml
STAGING: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from staging overlay
STAGING: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
STAGING: Regression testsDevOpsfull test suiteRun full regression test suite
STAGING: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before production promotion
PROD: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in prod/kustomization.yaml
PROD: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from prod overlay
PROD: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
PROD: Argo Rollouts canaryDevOpsArgo RolloutsCanary: 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% over 30 min
PROD: Monitor → complete/rollbackDevOpsPrometheus + Argo RolloutsAuto-rollback if error rate >1% or p99 >2s
Sinatra 4.0 Ruby Multi-stage

SCA note: Checks Ruby Advisory Database for vulnerable gem versions

Build note: ENV BUNDLE_PATH=/vendor/bundle for the runtime image

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev (git commit trigger)
IDE setupDevOpsRuby LSP + RuboCop + VS Code Ruby extensionInstall from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpshadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate (every PR push)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsbundler-auditbundle audit check --update
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpsbrakeman, semgrepbrakeman --exit-on-warn -o brakeman.json && semgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense_finderlicense_finder --decisions-file=doc/dependency_decisions.yml
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build (no push)DevOpsdocker buildxdocker build --platform linux/amd64 --target runtime -t app:pr-${{ github.sha }} --load .
SBOM generateDevSecOpssyftsyft packages docker:app:pr-$SHA -o spdx-json > sbom.json
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL app:pr-$SHA
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsbundler-auditbundle audit check --update
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpsbrakeman, semgrepbrakeman --exit-on-warn -o brakeman.json && semgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicense_finderlicense_finder --decisions-file=doc/dependency_decisions.yml
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpsRSpec + SimpleCovbundle exec rspec --format progress --format RspecJunitFormatter && codecov
DASTDevSecOpsOWASP ZAPzap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:3000
Perf testDevOpsk6k6 run perf/smoke.js
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — after Phase 3 completes
Image storeDevOpsDocker registry (see Registry section)Push completed in Phase 3 Build + Push above
Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM attachDevSecOpsoras attachoras attach --artifact-type application/vnd.cyclonedx $IMAGE@$DIGEST sbom.json
SLSA attachDevSecOpsoras attachAttached automatically by slsa-github-generator output
Promotions — DEV → TEST → STAGING → PROD (same pattern for all frameworks)
DEV: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in dev/kustomization.yaml
DEV: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from dev overlay; wait for rollout
DEV: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
DEV: Integration testsDevOpspytest / Jest / go test / curlRun integration test suite against deployed service
DEV: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers listed in environment settings
TEST: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in test/kustomization.yaml

TEST: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST

TEST: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before staging promotion
STAGING: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in staging/kustomization.yaml

DEV: Integration testsDevOpspytest / Jest / go test / curlRun integration test suite against deployed service
DEV: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers listed in environment settings
TEST: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in test/kustomization.yaml
TEST: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from test overlay
TEST: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
TEST: Integration + contract testsDevOpsPact / Dredd + test suiteRun contract and integration tests
TEST: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before staging promotion
STAGING: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in staging/kustomization.yaml
STAGING: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from staging overlay
STAGING: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
STAGING: Regression testsDevOpsfull test suiteRun full regression test suite
STAGING: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before production promotion
PROD: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in prod/kustomization.yaml
PROD: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from prod overlay
PROD: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
PROD: Argo Rollouts canaryDevOpsArgo RolloutsCanary: 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% over 30 min
PROD: Monitor → complete/rollbackDevOpsPrometheus + Argo RolloutsAuto-rollback if error rate >1% or p99 >2s

24 — Swift (Server)

Server-side Swift frameworks. swift build → swift:6.0-noble-slim runtime.  ·  See framework catalog →
Framework Language family Pattern Port Pkg mgr Runtime image
Vapor 4.121SwiftMulti-stage8080SPMswift:6.0-noble-slim
Hummingbird 2.0SwiftMulti-stage8080SPMswift:6.0-noble-slim
Vapor 4.121 Swift Multi-stage

SCA note: Also run: swift package show-dependencies | grep -i cve

Build note: Builds on ubuntu:24.04 with swift.org tarball; outputs single binary

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev (git commit trigger)
IDE setupDevOpsXcode + SourceKit-LSP + SwiftLintInstall from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpshadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate (every PR push)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsswift package auditswift package audit
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpsSwiftLint, semgrepswiftlint lint --strict && semgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpsswift-package-licenseswift-package-license generate
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build (no push)DevOpsdocker buildxdocker build --platform linux/amd64 --target runtime -t app:pr-${{ github.sha }} --load .
SBOM generateDevSecOpssyftsyft packages docker:app:pr-$SHA -o spdx-json > sbom.json
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL app:pr-$SHA
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsswift package auditswift package audit
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpsSwiftLint, semgrepswiftlint lint --strict && semgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpsswift-package-licenseswift-package-license generate
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpsswift test + XCTestswift test --enable-code-coverage && codecov
DASTDevSecOpsOWASP ZAPzap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:8080
Perf testDevOpsk6k6 run perf/smoke.js
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — after Phase 3 completes
Image storeDevOpsDocker registry (see Registry section)Push completed in Phase 3 Build + Push above
Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM attachDevSecOpsoras attachoras attach --artifact-type application/vnd.cyclonedx $IMAGE@$DIGEST sbom.json
SLSA attachDevSecOpsoras attachAttached automatically by slsa-github-generator output
Promotions — DEV → TEST → STAGING → PROD (same pattern for all frameworks)
DEV: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in dev/kustomization.yaml
DEV: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from dev overlay; wait for rollout
DEV: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
DEV: Integration testsDevOpspytest / Jest / go test / curlRun integration test suite against deployed service
DEV: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers listed in environment settings
TEST: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in test/kustomization.yaml
TEST: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from test overlay
TEST: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
TEST: Integration + contract testsDevOpsPact / Dredd + test suiteRun contract and integration tests
TEST: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before staging promotion
STAGING: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in staging/kustomization.yaml
STAGING: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from staging overlay
STAGING: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
STAGING: Regression testsDevOpsfull test suiteRun full regression test suite
STAGING: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before production promotion
PROD: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in prod/kustomization.yaml
PROD: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from prod overlay
PROD: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
PROD: Argo Rollouts canaryDevOpsArgo RolloutsCanary: 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% over 30 min
PROD: Monitor → complete/rollbackDevOpsPrometheus + Argo RolloutsAuto-rollback if error rate >1% or p99 >2s

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev (git commit trigger)
IDE setupDevOpsMetals (VS Code / IntelliJ IDEA) + ScalafmtInstall from extension marketplace

Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner

Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsOWASP Dependency-Check (sbt-dependency-check)sbt dependencyCheck
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpsScalafix + Wartremover, semgrepsbt scalafix && semgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpssbt-license-reportsbt dumpLicenseReport
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build (no push)DevOpsdocker buildxdocker build --platform linux/amd64 --target runtime -t app:pr-${{ github.sha }} --load .
SBOM generateDevSecOpssyftsyft packages docker:app:pr-$SHA -o spdx-json > sbom.json
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL app:pr-$SHA
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced

Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files

License ↗ parallelDevSecOpssbt-license-reportsbt dumpLicenseReport
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .

Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpsScalaTest + JaCoCosbt "set coverageEnabled := true" test coverageReport && codecov
DASTDevSecOpsOWASP ZAPzap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:9000
Perf testDevOpsk6 / Gatlingk6 run perf/smoke.js

Framework Language family Pattern Port Pkg mgr Runtime image
Ring 1.12Clojure (JVM)Multi-stage8080Leiningengcr.io/distroless/java21-debian12
Pedestal 0.7Clojure (JVM)Multi-stage8080Leiningengcr.io/distroless/java21-debian12
Ring 1.12 Clojure (JVM) Multi-stage

SCA note: deps.edn: use clj-holmes or OWASP Dependency-Check CLI

Build note: Produces uberjar (fat JAR); deps.edn: clj -T:build uber

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev (git commit trigger)
IDE setupDevOpsCalva (VS Code) / Cursive (IntelliJ)Install from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpshadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate (every PR push)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpslein nvd (NVD check)lein nvd check
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpsclj-kondo, eastwood, semgrepclj-kondo --lint src && semgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslein-licenseslein licenses
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build (no push)DevOpsdocker buildxdocker build --platform linux/amd64 --target runtime -t app:pr-${{ github.sha }} --load .
SBOM generateDevSecOpssyftsyft packages docker:app:pr-$SHA -o spdx-json > sbom.json
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL app:pr-$SHA
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpslein nvd (NVD check)lein nvd check
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpsclj-kondo, eastwood, semgrepclj-kondo --lint src && semgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslein-licenseslein licenses
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpsclojure.test + cloveragelein cloverage && codecov
DASTDevSecOpsOWASP ZAPzap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:8080
Perf testDevOpsk6 / Gatlingk6 run perf/smoke.js
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — after Phase 3 completes
Image storeDevOpsDocker registry (see Registry section)Push completed in Phase 3 Build + Push above
Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM attachDevSecOpsoras attachoras attach --artifact-type application/vnd.cyclonedx $IMAGE@$DIGEST sbom.json
SLSA attachDevSecOpsoras attachAttached automatically by slsa-github-generator output
Promotions — DEV → TEST → STAGING → PROD (same pattern for all frameworks)
DEV: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in dev/kustomization.yaml
DEV: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from dev overlay; wait for rollout
DEV: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
DEV: Integration testsDevOpspytest / Jest / go test / curlRun integration test suite against deployed service
DEV: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers listed in environment settings
TEST: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in test/kustomization.yaml
TEST: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from test overlay
TEST: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
TEST: Integration + contract testsDevOpsPact / Dredd + test suiteRun contract and integration tests
TEST: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before staging promotion
STAGING: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in staging/kustomization.yaml
STAGING: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from staging overlay
STAGING: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
STAGING: Regression testsDevOpsfull test suiteRun full regression test suite
STAGING: GateDevOpsGitHub environment protection ruleRequired approvers before production promotion
PROD: GitOps PRDevOpsgit + GitHub PRBump image digest in prod/kustomization.yaml
PROD: ArgoCD / Flux deployDevOpsArgoCD / FluxSync from prod overlay
PROD: cosign verifyDevSecOpscosigncosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID $IMAGE@$DIGEST
PROD: Argo Rollouts canaryDevOpsArgo RolloutsCanary: 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% over 30 min
PROD: Monitor → complete/rollbackDevOpsPrometheus + Argo RolloutsAuto-rollback if error rate >1% or p99 >2s
Pedestal 0.7 Clojure (JVM) Multi-stage

SCA note: deps.edn: use clj-holmes or OWASP Dependency-Check CLI

Build note: Produces uberjar (fat JAR); deps.edn: clj -T:build uber

27 — C / C++

C++ HTTP frameworks. cmake + make → scratch (static) or debian:12-slim (dynamic).  ·  See framework catalog →
Framework Language family Pattern Port Pkg mgr Runtime image
Drogon 1.9.13C/C++Multi-stage8080CMake+vcpkgscratch/debian:12-slim
Crow 1.3.2C/C++Multi-stage8080CMake+vcpkgscratch/debian:12-slim
Drogon 1.9.13 C/C++ Multi-stage

SCA note: Also: OWASP Dependency-Check CLI against CMake-generated dependency list

Build note: ARG LINK=static → musl-static target → scratch; ARG LINK=dynamic → debian:12-slim

Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Registry → Promotions
Stage Type Tool(s) Key command / action
Phase 0 — Bootstrap (once, same for all frameworks — see global section below)
Branch protectionDevOpsGitHub repo settings / GitLab protected branchesProtect main; require PR; enforce status checks; no direct push
CODEOWNERSDevOpsGitHub CODEOWNERS fileecho "* @your-team" > .github/CODEOWNERS
OIDC trustDevSecOpsGitHub OIDC + cloud IAM / Workload IdentityAdd permissions: id-token: write to all CI workflows; no stored cloud credentials
Registry accessDevOpsRegistry IAM / robot accountScope push permission to exact repo + branch only; pull allowed from all
Kyverno admission policyDevSecOpsKyverno + KubernetesBlock unsigned or unscanned images cluster-wide; enforce runAsNonRoot
Dependency update automationDevSecOpsRenovate / DependabotAdd .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json; weekly updates; auto-merge patch
Phase 1 — Local Dev (git commit trigger)
IDE setupDevOpsclangd + VS Code C++ extension + clang-tidyInstall from extension marketplace
Pre-commit hooksDevSecOpshadolint, gitleaks, hadolintpre-commit install && pre-commit run --all-files
Local secret scanDevSecOpsgitleaksgitleaks detect --source=. --no-banner
Phase 2 — PR Gate (every PR push)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsvcpkg audit / conan auditvcpkg x-check-support-status
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpsclang-tidy, cppcheck, semgrepclang-tidy src/**/*.cpp && cppcheck --enable=all src/ && semgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicenseelicensee detect --no-readme .
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet --soft-fail
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build (no push)DevOpsdocker buildxdocker build --platform linux/amd64 --target runtime -t app:pr-${{ github.sha }} --load .
SBOM generateDevSecOpssyftsyft packages docker:app:pr-$SHA -o spdx-json > sbom.json
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL app:pr-$SHA
PR reviewDevOpsGitHub required reviewersHuman approval — CODEOWNERS enforced
Phase 3 — Main Build (merge to main)
Pre-commit (CI)DevSecOpspre-commitpre-commit run --all-files
SCA ↗ parallelDevSecOpsvcpkg audit / conan auditvcpkg x-check-support-status
SAST ↗ parallelDevSecOpsclang-tidy, cppcheck, semgrepclang-tidy src/**/*.cpp && cppcheck --enable=all src/ && semgrep --config=auto .
License ↗ parallelDevSecOpslicenseelicensee detect --no-readme .
IaC scan ↗ parallelDevSecOpscheckovcheckov -d . --quiet
Secrets ↗ parallelDevSecOpstruffleHogtrufflehog git --only-verified .
Build + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA .
Build FIPS + PushDevOpsdocker buildxdocker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --push --target runtime-fips -t $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA-fips .
Release tagDevOpssemantic-release / git tagsemantic-release --no-ci → applies semver tag to image
Container scanDevSecOpsTrivytrivy image --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL $REGISTRY/$IMAGE:$SHA
SignDevSecOpscosign (keyless OIDC)cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/$IMAGE@$DIGEST
SBOM generate + attestDevSecOpssyft + cosign attestsyft packages $IMAGE@$DIGEST -o spdx-json | cosign attest --yes --predicate -
SLSA provenanceDevSecOpsslsa-github-generatoruses: slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator/.github/workflows/generator_container_slsa3.yml
Tests + CodecovDevOpsCatch2 / Google Testctest --output-on-failure && codecov
DASTDevSecOpsOWASP ZAPzap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:8080
Perf testDevOpsk6 / wrkk6 run perf/smoke.js
NotifyDevOpsSlack / Teamsslackapi/slack-github-action with job status
Registry — after Phase 3 completes
Image storeDevOpsDocker registry (see Registry section)Push completed in Phase 3 Build + Push above
Sign verifyDevSecOpscosign verifycosign verify --certificate-identity=$ID --certificate-oidc-issuer=$ISS $IMAGE@$DIGEST
